//: Remote plugin config for the AgentCore-hosted control plane. The runtime uses CUSTOM_JWT (Cognito) inbound auth, so a Bearer access token is required. Set SUNSTEAD_TOKEN in your environment to a Cognito access token (see scripts/setup_cognito.sh -> $BEARER_TOKEN, or the machine client_credentials token for control:* scopes). To use this remote config instead of the stdio .mcp.json, copy it over .mcp.json or register the URL directly with `claude mcp add`.
